scripts.build: npm run build -w @opencause/shared && npm run build -w @opencause/web && npm run build -w @opencause/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @opencause/shared && npm run typecheck -w @opencause/web && npm run typecheck -w @opencause/worker
scripts.test: npm run test -w @opencause/shared && npm run test -w @opencause/web && npm run test -w @opencause/worker
